criteria.name: Review cross-check completed
criteria.evidence: The claimed implementation files match the current workspace state. `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.tsx`, `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx`, `src/shared/contexts/PanesContext.tsx`, and `src/shared/contexts/__tests__/PanesContext.test.tsx` are present in the modified diff/status, and `src/features/editor/components/EditorPaneTab.tsx` is present as an untracked file in `git status`, which explains the audit mismatch for that path.

criteria.name: Unlock editor pane on navigate to video editor
criteria.evidence: `src/features/editor/components/EditorPaneTab.tsx:73-77` adds the required effect before the route early-return, keyed to both `location.pathname` and `isEditorPaneLocked`, and it calls `setIsEditorPaneLocked(false)`. Persistence is wired through `src/shared/contexts/usePaneLockPolicyState.ts:55-73`, where the setter updates local state and saves the lock change.

criteria.name: No main-content shift when locking editor pane
criteria.evidence: `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.tsx:35-38` now hard-codes `paddingTop: '0px'`, so the editor pane never pushes content down. The updated assertions in `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx:97-103` and `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx:106-138` explicitly check for `paddingTop: '0px'`.

criteria.name: Editor pane is 70% when both editor and generations are locked
criteria.evidence: `src/shared/contexts/PanesContext.tsx:139-176` sets `editorFraction` to `0.7` only when `locks.gens` is true and only compresses heights when both panes are visible. `src/features/editor/components/EditorPaneTab.tsx:136-145` renders the pane using that `effectiveEditorPaneHeight` directly. `src/shared/contexts/__tests__/PanesContext.test.tsx:316-339` covers the 1200px tier-1 case and expects `editorHeight`/`effectiveEditorHeight` of `840`.

criteria.name: Editor pane remains 90% when only editor is locked
criteria.evidence: With generations not visible, `bothVisible` is false in `src/shared/contexts/PanesContext.tsx:144-176`, so the effective editor height falls back to the ideal `Math.round(viewportHeight * 0.9)`. `src/shared/contexts/__tests__/PanesContext.test.tsx:341-355` verifies the 600px case stays at `540`.

criteria.name: No double-subtraction in EditorPaneTab
criteria.evidence: `src/features/editor/components/EditorPaneTab.tsx:38-49` sets `adjustedEditorPaneHeight = effectiveEditorPaneHeight` and returns that value; the generations-offset subtraction path is gone. The rendered pane height at `src/features/editor/components/EditorPaneTab.tsx:136-137` also uses `effectiveEditorPaneHeight` directly.

criteria.name: Targeted test coverage and executor validation
criteria.evidence: The updated targeted tests are present in `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx` and `src/shared/contexts/__tests__/PanesContext.test.tsx`, and the executor recorded successful runs for those files plus `src/shared/contexts/usePaneLockPolicyState.test.ts` and `src/features/layout/hooks/useBottomOffset.test.ts`. No conflicting evidence appears in the diff or audit beyond the dirty-tree/untracked-file advisories.

summary: Approved. The implementation matches the settled decisions and the six success criteria check out against the current code and executor evidence. The only residual gap is the already-noted lack of a dedicated regression test for the route-unlock effect, but the implementation itself follows the required hydration-safe pattern and persists the unlock through the shared lock-policy setter.

task_verdicts.reviewer_verdict: Pass. `LayoutMainContent` removes the editor-pane top offset entirely and keeps the generations bottom-offset path intact.
Pass. The layout test now expects `paddingTop: 0px` and still checks the other container styles; the added route-shell assertions are consistent with the current component behavior.
Pass. `EditorPaneTab` adds the unlock-on-route effect before the early return, depends on both route and live lock state, and uses `setIsEditorPaneLocked(false)` directly.
Pass. `PanesContext` now computes a 70% editor ideal only when generations is locked and only compresses heights when both panes are actually visible.
Pass. The editor pane no longer subtracts generations height a second time; it consumes the context-provided effective height directly.
Pass. The PanesContext tests were updated to the corrected visibility-aware model and add explicit 70%/90% assertions for the editor height rules.
Pass. The executor’s recorded commands cover all four requested Vitest files, and there is no code evidence suggesting those runs are inconsistent with the current implementation.

sense_check_verdicts.verdict: Confirmed. `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.tsx:24-38` still computes generations bottom padding from `(isGenerationsPaneLocked || isGenerationsPaneOpen)` and `effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight`.
Confirmed. `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx:97-103` still asserts `marginRight`, `marginLeft`, `paddingBottom`, and `willChange`; only the top-padding expectation changed.
Confirmed. The new unlock effect sits at `src/features/editor/components/EditorPaneTab.tsx:73-77`, before the early return at `src/features/editor/components/EditorPaneTab.tsx:79-81`.

Confirmed. `src/shared/contexts/PanesContext.tsx:142-143` derives `editorPaneHeight` from a 70%/90% fraction, and `src/shared/contexts/PanesContext.tsx:215-221` exposes that value through the layout context.
Confirmed. `src/features/editor/components/EditorPaneTab.tsx:38-42` now forwards the context `effectiveEditorPaneHeight` unchanged.

Confirmed. The both-visible compression tests remain in `src/shared/contexts/__tests__/PanesContext.test.tsx:200-314`, and their assertions still align with the unchanged compression tiers once `bothVisible` is true.

Confirmed. In code, `src/shared/contexts/PanesContext.tsx:167-176` leaves `effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight` equal to the configured generations height when only the generations pane is visible, and the executor also recorded a passing run of `src/features/layout/hooks/useBottomOffset.test.ts`.
